---
title: "Welcome to the blog"
description: "Why I am starting to write here, and what to expect."
author: "Mesfin Genie"
date: "2026-07-01"
categories: [news]
---

I am starting this space to write short, practical notes alongside my research.

Most of my published work lives in journals, which is the right home for full studies. But a lot of useful thinking never makes it into a paper: how to set up a discrete choice experiment, why a design choice matters, what a result does and does not tell a policymaker, and how the decision tools I build are meant to be used.

The plan is to keep posts short and specific. Expect notes on choice modelling and preference research, behavioural evidence in stated-preference studies, economic evaluation in health and public policy, and the occasional walkthrough of one of the interactive tools.

If something here is useful for your own work, or you would like me to write about a particular method, feel free to get in touch.
